# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

// Page Router - Dynamically includes page templates based on URL parameter

// Define the base templates directory
define('TEMPLATES_DIR', __DIR__ . '/templates');

// Define allowed pages (whitelist for security)
$allowed_pages = [
    'home',
    'about',
    'contact',
    'services',
    'blog',
    'portfolio',
    'faq',
    'privacy',
    'terms',
    '404',
];

// Get the requested page from the URL parameter, default to 'home'
$page = isset($_GET['page']) ? $_GET['page'] : 'home';

// Sanitize the page parameter to prevent directory traversal attacks
// Remove any path separators, dots, and special characters
$page = basename($page);
$page = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/', '', $page);

// Validate the page against the whitelist
if (!in_array($page, $allowed_pages)) {
    $page = '404';
}

// Build the full file path
$template_file = TEMPLATES_DIR . '/' . $page . '.php';

// Check if the template file exists
if (!file_exists($template_file)) {
    $template_file = TEMPLATES_DIR . '/404.php';
    $page = '404';
}

// Set appropriate HTTP status code for 404 pages
if ($page === '404') {
    http_response_code(404);
}

// Helper function to get current page name (available to templates)
function current_page() {
    global $page;
    return $page;
}

// Helper function to check if a page is active (for navigation highlighting)
function is_active($page_name) {
    global $page;
    return $page === $page_name ? 'active' : '';
}

// Helper function to generate page URL
function page_url($page_name) {
    return '?page=' . urlencode($page_name);
}

// Helper function to safely include a partial/component template
function include_partial($partial_name) {
    $partial_name = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/', '', $partial_name);
    $partial_file = TEMPLATES_DIR . '/partials/' . $partial_name . '.php';
    if (file_exists($partial_file)) {
        include $partial_file;
    }
}

?>
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title><?php echo ucfirst(htmlspecialchars($page)); ?> - My CMS</title>
    <style>
        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
        body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; color: #333; }
        header { background: #2c3e50; color: #fff; padding: 1rem 2rem; }
        header h1 { display: inline-block; margin-right: 2rem; }
        nav { display: inline-block; }
        nav a { color: #ecf0f1; text-decoration: none; margin-right: 1rem; padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; }
        nav a.active { background: #3498db; }
        nav a:hover { background: #34495e; }
        .content { max-width: 1200px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 0 2rem; }
        footer { background: #2c3e50; color: #fff; text-align: center; padding: 1rem; margin-top: 2rem; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <header>
        <h1>My CMS</h1>
        <nav>
            <a href="<?php echo page_url('home'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active('home'); ?>">Home</a>
            <a href="<?php echo page_url('about'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active('about'); ?>">About</a>
            <a href="<?php echo page_url('services'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active('services'); ?>">Services</a>
            <a href="<?php echo page_url('blog'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active('blog'); ?>">Blog</a>
            <a href="<?php echo page_url('portfolio'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active('portfolio'); ?>">Portfolio</a>
            <a href="<?php echo page_url('contact'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active('contact'); ?>">Contact</a>
            <a href="<?php echo page_url('faq'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active('faq'); ?>">FAQ</a>
        </nav>
    </header>

    <div class="content">
        <?php
        // Include the requested template
        include $template_file;
        ?>
    </div>

    <footer>
        <p>&copy; <?php echo date('Y'); ?> My CMS. All rights reserved.</p>
    </footer>
</body>
</html>

<?php
/*
 * SETUP INSTRUCTIONS:
 * 
 * 1. Create a "templates" directory in the same folder as this file.
 * 2. Create a "templates/partials" directory for reusable components.
 * 3. Add PHP template files for each page, for example:
 *
 *    templates/home.php:
 *    <h2>Welcome Home</h2>
 *    <p>This is the home page.</p>
 *
 *    templates/about.php:
 *    <h2>About Us</h2>
 *    <p>Learn more about us.</p>
 *
 *    templates/404.php:
 *    <h2>Page Not Found</h2>
 *    <p>Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.</p>
 *
 *    templates/partials/sidebar.php:
 *    <aside>Sidebar content here</aside>
 *
 * 4. To add new pages, add the page name to the $allowed_pages array
 *    and create the corresponding template file.
 *
 * 5. Use include_partial('sidebar') inside templates to include partials.
 * 
 * USAGE:
 *   index.php              -> loads home page
 *   index.php?page=about   -> loads about page
 *   index.php?page=unknown -> loads 404 page
 */
?>
